title: Echinopepon torquatus
taxonomy: Echinopepon torquatus is classified as a species within the genus Echinopepon. Echinopepon torquatus is a member of the Cucurbitaceae family, which includes other gourds and melons. This classification places it within the order Cucurbitales. Echinopepon torquatus is further classified as a type of flowering plant, with the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Echinopepon torquatus is part of the larger system of taxonomy used to categorize living organisms.
